name: Garlic Shrimp with Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 lb raw medium shrimp, peeled and deveined
1 can (14 oz) artichoke hearts, drained and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons butter.
2. Cook onion until tender.
3. Add water and bring to a boil.
4. Stir in Noodles & Sauce Butter & Herb and continue boiling over medium heat, stirring occasionally, for 8 minutes or until noodles are tender.
5. Meanwhile, heat remaining 2 tablespoons butter with olive oil in a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Cook garlic for 30 seconds.
7. Add shrimp and artichokes; cook, stirring occasionally, for 3 minutes or until shrimp are opaque.
8. Stir in parsley and pepper.
9. Serve shrimp mixture with hot noodles.
10. Garnish, if desired, with watercress.
